name: Fount of Moonlight
description: A cool light wreathes your body until the spell ends. The light, which sheds dim light in a 10-foot radius, can't be dispelled by the Darkness spell. Until the spell ends, you have Resistance to Radiant damage, and when a creature within 5 feet of you hits you with a melee attack, that creature takes 2d6 Radiant damage.
